Delivery Options.label: School Curriculum
Delivery Options.value: Robokorda embeds robotics and coding into the formal timetable with structured lesson plans and progress tracking.

Delivery Options.label: Extra-Curricular
Delivery Options.value: After-school robotics clubs give learners a premium innovation space beyond core lessons while staying connected to school life.

Delivery Options.label: Weekend Programmes
Delivery Options.value: Weekend cohorts open the Robokorda pathway to families, homeschool communities, and learners outside partner schools.

Partners.label: Independent and private schools
Partners.value: Schools looking to strengthen practical robotics, coding, and innovation pathways.

Partners.label: Public school networks
Partners.value: Districts and school groups building wider access to technology education.

Partners.label: NGOs and development partners
Partners.value: Organisations focused on youth capability, digital inclusion.

Partners.label: Innovation hubs and universities
Partners.value: Institutions that want stronger junior innovation pipelines.

Gallery.label: Classroom robotics sprint
Gallery.value: Learners work through guided assembly and testing sessions.

Gallery.label: Young coders at work
Gallery.value: Block-based logic activities help students connect creativity.

Gallery.label: Weekend innovation studio
Gallery.value: Families and learners use weekend sessions.
